CustomField.description: Max date value from OBS Welcome Email Sent field on Account and Primary Contact
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.OBS_Welcome_Email_Sent__c)), ISBLANK(Primary_Contact__r.OBS_Welcome_Email_Sent__c) ), Account__r.OBS_Welcome_Email_Sent__c, IF( AND( ISBLANK(Account__r.OBS_Welcome_Email_Sent__c), NOT(ISBLANK(Primary_Contact__r.OBS_Welcome_Email_Sent__c)) ), Primary_Contact__r.OBS_Welcome_Email_Sent__c, IF( Account__r.OBS_Welcome_Email_Sent__c > Primary_Contact__r.OBS_Welcome_Email_Sent__c, Account__r.OBS_Welcome_Email_Sent__c, Primary_Contact__r.OBS_Welcome_Email_Sent__c ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Max date value from OBS Welcome Email Sent field on Account and Primary Contact
CustomField.label: OBS Welcome Email Sent
